# MOLT Blocks - Nonprofit Financing Agent

## Families present
- aim
- blueprint
- directive
- instruction
- need
- philosophy
- subject
- trigger
- strategy
- use

## Example block names
### aim
- `AIM.NPF.001` - Complete Organizational Profile

### trigger
- `TRG.NPF.001` - New Nonprofit Seeking Funding Strategy
- `TRG.NPF.002` - Grant Research Request

- `DIR.NPF.002` - Identify Top Grant Opportunities
